general_feeling: They got many strange looks. Most people thought it was a GoPro or similar. One person thought I had been in an accident.
challenges: They did not fit properly and kept falling off. I had to tape them to my face which was very irritating. And my toddler would often grab at them. At times when I was not able to tape them to my face, I had to wear a cap and rest the glasses on the peak (this was mainly at the weekend). But in this situation I felt I did not have free movement of my head.
act_impact: When I had to look after my toddler, e.g. bending over,  playing, etc
beh_adapt: Not really. The first day I cycled with them I went to work later than usual, so there would be less other traffic, while I got used to the glasses
social: Every time I met someone in person they asked about the devices. By the end of the week it got a bit boring to explain it each time
improvements: Glasses that are somehow adjustable so that they are a better fit. Or with different sizes and shapes of glasses to choose from, so that the best fir can be selected
